name: Jay Beckenstein
abstract: Jay Barnet Beckenstein (born May 14, 1951) is an American saxophonist, composer, producer, and the co-founder of the band Spyro Gyra. He owned BearTracks Studios in Suffern, New York.

about_quotes.speaker: Greg Thomas
about_quotes.evidence: I interviewed Jay Beckenstein, the lead alto player for Spyro Gyra.
about_quotes.doc_title: Greg Thomas interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clinton, New York, October 11, 2014
